overview.description: Apify is a full-stack web scraping and data extraction platform that enables developers and businesses to extract structured data from any website and automate web workflows.
overview.description_long: Founded in 2015 from Y Combinator Fellowship, Apify provides a cloud platform for web scraping, browser automation, and data extraction at scale. The platform features a marketplace of over 21,000 ready-made scraping tools (called Actors), open-source Crawlee library, proxy infrastructure, and integrations with AI/LLM ecosystems. Apify serves 25,000+ customers worldwide including enterprise clients like Siemens, Microsoft, T-Mobile, and Accenture, processing over 1 PB of data monthly.
overview.tagline: Get real-time web data for your AI

history.origin_story: Apify was launched by Jan Curn and Jakub Balada in 2015 from the Y Combinator Fellowship in Mountain View, California. The original idea was to make it easy for developers to build flexible and scalable web crawlers using front-end JavaScript with headless browser technology. In 2016, the team moved back to the Czech Republic, raised a seed investment, and started building a full-stack platform for web scraping and browser automation.
key_milestones: 2015: Founded from Y Combinator Fellowship in Mountain View
2016: Moved back to Czech Republic, raised seed investment
2019: Secured additional funding from Reflex Capital
2024: Raised EUR 2.8M (~$3M) led by J&T Ventures with participation from Reflex Capital
2024: Launched MCP server integration for AI agent connectivity

open_roles: Backend Engineer for Web Automation team (Node.js)
Senior Backend Engineer for proxy and unblocking
Senior Backend Engineer for developer platform (Node.js/TypeScript)
Backend Engineer for open source frameworks (TypeScript)
Get paid on Apify (Remote, Part time)
Senior Product Manager for Core Product

awards: Sifted 30 - fastest-growing startups across Central Europe

metadata.notes: Revenue figure of $13.3M comes from LATKA for 2024. PitchBook lists total funding as $3.29M. Company has been profitable and growing from its own revenue since 2019 seed round until the 2024 round. Apify was originally a web scraping tool but has pivoted significantly toward AI data infrastructure. HQ is in Lucerna Palace, Prague; Brno office in Titanium business center.
